title: Assemblywoman Quirk-Silva Returns to State Capitol to Tackle Budget and Legislation Related to COVID-19
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The Integrated School-Based Behavioral Health Partnership Program encourages local educational agencies and county behavioral health agencies to collaborate on providing mental and behavioral health services on school campuses.
Assembly Bill 2265 authorizes counties to treat patients with mental health issues and co-occurring substance use disorders statewide under the Mental Health Services Act.
Legislative efforts are being made to address homelessness, mental health, and education during the pandemic.
